scope: Full typed surface: every official Bitbucket Swagger operation from https://api.bitbucket.org/swagger.json is covered by an explicit stream, direct-read command, or approval-gated reverse ETL write action. Raw generic API execution remains disallowed. Binary/text reads return bounded base64 JSON only and never write to the local filesystem.

direct_reads: operation get addon addon-key client-key
